creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I was about to look at integrating and maintaining this port, however the upstream project is dead so I don't think it's a good idea to add this to the ports collection without an active upstream project.

https://git.ercpe.de/ercpe/amavisvt is 404.

https://github.com/ercpe/amavisvt/ says 
This repository has been archived by the owner on May 30, 2020. It is now read-only. 

Thank you for your submission anyway.
